name: bootstrap-success
description: Happy-path boot: host reads `_meta.ui.resourceUri`, fetches `ui://ggui/render`, the thin shell loads the renderer bundle, `ui/initialize` returns valid `_meta.ggui.bootstrap.{wsUrl, token, sessionId, appId, runtimeUrl}`, WS handshake succeeds, the render mounts with `data-ggui-code-ready="true"`. No bootstrap-failed postMessage, no contract-error, no upgrade-required.
